rooms.name: Entry
rooms.description: You stand in the entry room of the old manor. Dusty chairs face a cold fireplace, a coat rack leans against the west wall, and an ornate chandelier hangs overhead like it has been waiting for company. A pale window to the south is the room's only light.
rooms.description_cleared: The Shadow Rat is gone. The entry room still creaks around you, but the chandelier no longer feels like it is watching. For the first time, the manor seems willing to let you pass.
rooms.dev_note: // this is the starting room!! so cool

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.description: A long passage splits the manor into wings. Two glass doors flash with distant lightning, and unlit candles line the walls like someone set them for guests who never arrived. The grand hall waits ahead; colder drafts creep from deeper rooms.
rooms.dev_note: // mrs. henderson said I need more descriptions lol

rooms.name: West Entertaining Room
rooms.description: A dusty room with a grand piano in the corner. The keys are yellowed and some are missing. Old portraits hang crooked on the walls, their eyes seeming to follow you. There is a fireplace, but it has not been lit in years.
rooms.description_cleared: With the Shadow Rat gone, the west room settles into ordinary dust. The piano is still broken, but the portraits look like portraits again instead of witnesses.
rooms.dev_note: // I want to add a piano puzzle here eventually

rooms.name: East Entertaining Room
rooms.description: A long dining table fills the room, still set with plates, cups, and tarnished silver. The meal was abandoned halfway through. Grey food slumps on porcelain, and one chair has been pulled back so sharply it carved a line in the floor.
rooms.description_cleared: The Manor Ghost is gone, and the dining room feels like a room again instead of a held breath. The abandoned meal remains, but whatever interrupted it has finally moved on.
rooms.dev_note: // the ghost here is pretty spooky I think

rooms.name: Main Hall
rooms.description: The main hall rises higher than the entry made you expect. A massive staircase climbs to the second floor, flanked by suits of armor. One is missing its head. A red carpet runs up the stairs and vanishes into the dark above.
rooms.dev_note: // this is so cool it feels like a real castle

rooms.name: West Wing
rooms.description: The west wing is dark and cold. Wallpaper peels from the walls, and something shifts behind it when you look away. Most doors are locked or swollen shut. A broken window lets in wind that smells like rain and old dust.
rooms.description_cleared: The west wing is still cold, but the movement behind the wallpaper has stopped. The broken window rattles softly, and the locked doors seem less like threats now.
rooms.dev_note: // TODO: add a dragon here maybe

rooms.name: East Wing
rooms.description: The east wing smells like old books and dust. Paintings of people you do not know cover every wall. At the end of the hall, a tall mirror returns your reflection a second too late.
rooms.description_cleared: The ghost is gone from the east wing. The mirror still lags behind you, but now it looks more like a flaw in the glass than a second person trying to copy your face.
rooms.dev_note: // the mirror thing is super creepy right??

rooms.name: North Wing
rooms.description: The north wing holds the bedrooms. Most doors are locked, but cold air seeps through the keyholes. The beds are made too perfectly for a house this abandoned. At the end of the hall, stairs descend into the cellar dark.

rooms.name: Library
rooms.description: Bookshelves climb from floor to ceiling. A ladder on wheels waits beside them, and the oldest books are marked with symbols that look less like letters and more like broken instructions. A spiral staircase rises to a glass dome.
rooms.dev_note: // I read that librarys in old houses are always haunted

rooms.name: Library Dome
rooms.description: You climb to the top of the library, where a glass dome shows the sky through a skin of dust. A desk is buried under scattered papers, and a telescope points at a blank patch of air as if the real thing to see is invisible.
rooms.description_cleared: The dome is quiet, and with the Ancient Map in your bag, the papers on the desk stop looking random. Lines connect rooms, then paths, then places the manor never admitted were there. The telescope still points at empty air, but now you wonder what empty means.
rooms.dev_note: // this is my favorite room in the manor :)

rooms.name: Wine Cellar
rooms.description: The cellar is cold and damp. Wine racks line the walls, most bottles broken or black with age. Something dark moves between the racks, too smooth to be a normal shadow. The air smells like old wine, wet stone, and something wrong.
rooms.description_cleared: The Cellar Shade has fallen into a drift of ash between the wine racks. The bottles are still broken, but the air finally smells like ordinary dust and old cork. The manor above seems to exhale.
rooms.dev_note: // boss fight!! the cellar shade is really hard

rooms.name: Dungeon
rooms.description: Below the cellar is a real dungeon: chains on the walls, old cages, and scratch marks gouged into the stone. Your light barely reaches the corners. Whatever the manor locked away down here left marks before it became a shadow.
rooms.dev_note: // this is like the darkest part of the manor. so epic

rooms.name: Yard
rooms.description: The yard has not been trimmed in ages. Overgrown grass covers the paths, and the trees have grown wild around the manor walls. To the west, a dark forest waits. To the south, a dusty path leads away from the house and into the wider broken world.
rooms.dev_note: // the yard connects to the wilds and the wastes
